title: justicia microphylla
intro: Justicia microphylla, also known as Dwarf Justicia, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia microphylla include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, or used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
